title: GraphEdge
description: One edge in graph/graph.json. graph.json is a GENERATED artifact — built by pipeline/build/build_graph.py from node connects_to fields and global home assignments. It is never hand-edited; hand edits are overwritten on every build.

kind.description: references: node → node/global link from connects_to. home_of: zone node → the global whose deep explainer it hosts. disambiguates: 'this vs. that' pair. prerequisite: derived learning-order edge (topological, Milestone 3+).
